name: Enterprise-Warehouse-Management-System
postCreateCommand: apt-get update -y > /dev/null 2>&1; apt-get install -y mysql-server > /dev/null 2>&1; npm --prefix /workspace/frontend install > /dev/null 2>&1; echo '=== 环境就绪 ==='; echo 'Java:'; java -version 2>&1 | head -1; echo 'Node:'; node -v; echo 'MySQL:'; mysql --version; echo '运行 bash .devcontainer/start.sh 启动项目'
